candidate_definitions.text: Multi-platform (manifest list/OCI index) registry image query utility
A simple utility and serverless-based backend for querying Docker v2 & OCI v1 container images

Airline Booking is a sample web application that provides Flight Search, Flight Payment, Flight Booking and Loyalty points including end-to-end testing, GraphQL and CI/CD. This web application was the theme of Build on Serverless Season 2 on AWS Twitch running from April 24th until end of August in 2019.

Serverless Airline Booking is a complete web application that provides Flight Search, Payment, Booking and Loyalty points including end-to-end testing, GraphQL and CI/CD. This web application was the theme of Build on Serverless Season 2 on AWS Twitch running from April 24th unt…
✨  Learn how to use AWS Lambda to easily create infinitely scalable web services
